description_long: This curtain features a full-length, vertically draped design with a soft, textured fabric in a muted taupe color. The surface displays subtle, evenly spaced pleats that run from the top to the bottom, creating a gentle wave effect. The bottom edge is slightly irregular, with some folds extending lower than others, adding a natural, relaxed appearance. The fabric appears to be of medium thickness, providing privacy while still allowing some light diffusion. The top edge is straight and likely designed for mounting on a rod or track, with no visible decorative elements or hardware. The overall look is modern and understated, suitable for both residential and commercial urban interiors.
description: A full-length, taupe-colored curtain with soft pleats and a textured fabric, featuring a straight top and gently draped folds. The design is modern and minimalistic, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the curtain with vertical pleats and a straight top edge.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile and the depth of the fabric folds.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the pleated texture and the curtain's overall width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and the layered draping.
